articles.author: Jen Judson
articles.title: Hegseth Hails US Allies in Asia, Hits Out at European Nations - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth praised defense allies in Asia and hailed newly stable ties with China, while taking swipes at longstanding security partners in Europe.
articles.content:
US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth praised defense allies in Asia and hailed newly stable ties with China, while taking swipes at longstanding security partners in Europe.
